title: Back to school
big_question: Làm thế nào để nói lớp học của em có những gì bằng tiếng Anh?
grammar: There's a/an + [singular noun].
There are some + [plural noun].
Imperatives: Stand up. / Open your book.
Negative imperatives: Don't sit down. / Don't close your book.

mini_games.prompt: You write on this with chalk. It's usually green or black.
You look at this to know the time.
There _______ some books on the shelf.

title: My Day
big_question: Hỏi và kể về một ngày của em bằng tiếng Anh như thế nào?
grammar: What's the time? / What time is it? - It's (nine) o'clock.
When do you (get up)? - At (seven) o'clock.
Third person singular: Claire gets up at eight o'clock.
phonics: Long sound /i:/ (ee, ea): see, tree, beach, eat
skills: Asking and answering about daily routines
speaking_prompts: What does your mum do in the morning?

mini_games.prompt: You do this in the morning to put on your clothes.
This is the last thing you do at night.
A: When do you go to school? B: _______ eight o'clock.

title: The zoo
big_question: Nói về con vật yêu thích và thức ăn của chúng bằng tiếng Anh thế nào?
grammar: He/She/It likes (bananas).
He/She/It doesn't like (carrots).
Does (the monkey) like (bananas)? - Yes, it does. / No, it doesn't.
phonics: Short /i/ (hippo, lizard) and long /aɪ/ (fly, spider, tiger, kite)

mini_games.prompt: This animal is black and white and looks like a horse.
It's a very big animal with a long nose. It lives in Africa.
The monkey _______ bananas.

title: Where we live
big_question: Hỏi và miêu tả vị trí các nơi trong thị trấn bằng tiếng Anh thế nào?
grammar: Has your town got a (swimming pool)? - Yes, it has. / No, it hasn't.
Prepositions: between, behind, in front of, next to
skills: Talking about places in a town
Asking and answering about what a place has
speaking_prompts: Has your town got a cinema?
Is the park next to the school?

mini_games.prompt: You go here to watch films on a big screen.
If you are sick, you go to this place.
The cinema is _______ the shop and the café.

title: The market
big_question: Mua bán và hỏi về đồ ăn ở chợ bằng tiếng Anh như thế nào?
grammar: Would you like a (tomato)/some (bread)? - Yes, please. / No, thank you.
Is there any (bread)? / Are there any (pears)? - Yes, there is/are. / No, there isn't/aren't any.
phonics: Sound /w/ (w, wh): window, white, wall, witch, wheel, water
skills: Asking about the availability of food

mini_games.prompt: It's a long, yellow fruit that is sour.
This fruit is very big, green outside and red inside.
Would you like _______ bread?

title: My bedroom
big_question: Miêu tả đồ đạc trong phòng ngủ và hỏi 'Cái này của ai?' bằng tiếng Anh thế nào?
grammar: This/These (near), That/Those (far).
Whose (hat) is this? / Whose (socks) are these?
It's (May)'s. / They're (Fred)'s.
phonics: Long /u:/ (moon, zoo, pool, food) and short /ʊ/ (look, book, good, football)
clil_topic: Science: Materials (wood, metal, plastic, glass, fabric)
project: Draw and label a room with materials
speaking_prompts: What is your bed made of?

mini_games.prompt: You look at yourself in this.
You keep your clothes in this.
_______ book is this? - It's mine.

title: People
big_question: Miêu tả ngoại hình và cảm xúc của một người bằng tiếng Anh thế nào?
grammar: Are you (angry)? - Yes, I am. / No, I'm not. I'm (tired).
Our birthdays are in May. / Their birthdays are in December.
phonics: Long /eɪ/ (a_e, ai, ay): lake, face, rain, play
project: Draw a portrait and write a description

mini_games.prompt: You have two of these. You see with them.
If you have no energy, you feel this.
_______ birthdays are in June. (My family and me)

title: Off we go!
big_question: Nói về ước mơ được đi du lịch bằng các phương tiện khác nhau thế nào?
grammar: I'd like to (fly a plane).
Present continuous: What are you doing? - I'm flying a plane.
Are you flying a plane? - Yes, I am. / No, I'm not.
phonics: Long /u:/ (u_e, ew, ue, ou, oo): rule, chew, blue, you, zoo, scooter
skills: Asking and answering about ongoing actions
Talking about different modes of transport
clil_topic: Geography: Where transport goes (land, air, water)
speaking_prompts: Where would you like to go?
How do you travel to school?

mini_games.prompt: This vehicle can fly and has big blades on top.
This is a big vehicle that carries goods on the road.
I'd _______ to go to the moon.

title: Sports club
big_question: Nói về môn thể thao yêu thích và rủ bạn cùng chơi thế nào?
grammar: V-ing as subject: Swimming is fun. / Flying a kite is difficult.
What sport do you like doing? - I like playing tennis.
Agreeing: So do I. / Me too!
phonics: Long /əʊ/ (o, oa, ow, o_e): potato, mango, goal, boat, yellow, throw, hole, score
project: Make a leaflet about your favourite sport
speaking_prompts: What sport do you like doing?
I like football. So do I!

mini_games.prompt: You play this sport with a small white ball and a racket.
You wear these to protect your eyes in the pool.
_______ basketball is fun.

title: Holiday plans
big_question: Xin phép người lớn đi chơi thì nói tiếng Anh như nào nhỉ?
grammar: Can I/Can we (build a tree house)? - Yes, of course you/we can.
Revision: Questions with Do/Does, Have got, Can (ability), Where, Whose.
phonics: Sound /z/ for plural 's': cousins, lizards, bananas, apples, zebras
skills: Talking about holiday plans and activities
Revising key grammar from the level
clil_topic: Environmental studies: Helping the environment on holiday
project: Design a scrapbook page about a holiday place

mini_games.prompt: You sleep in a tent and cook outside when you do this.
You can keep photos and tickets in this book.
_______ I go swimming, please?
